resources.string: The crystal staff shatters. Only bare fists remain.

No spells. No hidden blades. No strikes from afar. Iron and brass stride through the fire, heads unbowed. The distance closes. The staff shatters. Shields are torn by bare hands. Steel meets steel. The sparks tell the only truth: face to face, eye to eye, bone under iron.
Iron crushes magic. Only the strike is true. Words of power crumble beneath the weight of relentless steel, leaving nothing but the brutal honesty of the killing blow.

Wards fold like paper. Runes are crushed to dust. They hide behind tricks and sorcery. Iron armor does not yield. It walks through fire. It ignores cowardice. When the blade falls, the lie ends. No magic saves you when iron splits bone. This is the only honest death.
